title: Tech-Priest
tier: Initiate — the backbone rank of the Adeptus Mechanicus
specialty: Machine maintenance, ritual operation, field repair across all Imperial forces
lore: The Tech-Priest is the basic ordained rank of the Adeptus Mechanicus — a holy engineer who has taken the first steps on the Long Path of augmentation and knowledge. Every Tech-Priest has undergone at least partial cybernetic conversion, replacing flesh with sacred machine.

They are ubiquitous across the Imperium, attached to every significant military force, starship, and manufactorum. Without Tech-Priests to perform the sacred rites of maintenance, the Imperium's machinery would grind to a halt within a generation.

A Tech-Priest who shows exceptional promise may specialise into one of the many Divisiones of the Mechanicus — becoming a Magos of Biologis, Logis, Fabricator, Reductor, or one of dozens of other disciplines — eventually ascending to the rank of Magos and beyond.
